non_fluorinated_analogs.name: Octane sulfonic acid (non-fluorinated analog of PFOS)

CF2 with tertiary amine - EU should reject
Amine between CF3 groups - EU may accept

CF2H-CF3 - CF2 bonded to H, may not match
